transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: My card isn't working. I'm trying to make a payment for my rent — fifteen hundred pounds — and it keeps saying declined.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I don't know it off the top of my head. Can you look me up by name?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I need the account number for security reasons.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Right. Your account shows fine. If the payment isn't going through it must be the recipient's account that's the problem.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: My landlord's account has worked for three years of rent payments. Can you check if there's a daily limit on my card?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Your card is standard. That should be on your app.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I'm asking you. My rent is going to be late.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Just try again in a few hours, these things usually clear. Sorry, not much else I can do.

planted_violations: failed to verify customer identity — used account number alone with no further checks
failed to check card daily limit or investigate decline reason
directed customer to app instead of providing information directly
no action taken; customer left with urgent unresolved issue
